text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way back from shopping, I see Curren
Chan invite Admire Vega to a cafe.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm real tired... Let's take a break and get
something sweet to eat. Okay?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm going home. Pass me my stuff.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're Ayabe's trainer! The two of us were
just about to go and grab pancakes.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I never agreed to that. We just bumped into each
other by chance.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I just can't get my mind off of pancakes. Look,
even your trainer is making an "I want a pancake"
face.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You are. So, let's go already! Pancaaakes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey, let go! Quit pulling me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Look at this pancake tower! ♪ The fruit
decorations are so cute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at the mountain of thick pancakes topped
extravagantly with fruit and gourmet
marshmallows.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Now this is a treat worth splitting! Let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh? It's... so fluffy...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! The pancakes sold here are so airy, they
just melt in your mouth!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
This texture... it's so light on the palate. You just
wind up eating more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pancake on Admire Vega's plate disappears
in an instant.
choice_data_list: Try not to eat too much, okay?
Try not to eat too much, okay?
(I'll let her eat as much as she wants.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pancake on Admire Vega's plate disappears
in an instant.
choice_data_list: Try not to eat too much, okay?
Try not to eat too much, okay?
(I'll let her eat as much as she wants.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Well... of course, I was only planning to eat this
one plate.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Delicious...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I knew you'd enjoy these fluffy pancakes,
Ayabe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega carefully and slowly savors her
reasonable serving of pancakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega is normally strict on herself. I think
it would be good for her to indulge in something
she enjoys every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The bottom layers remind me of chiffon cake.
They're really fluffy...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I knew you'd enjoy these fluffy pancakes,
Ayabe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the tower of pancakes is meant to serve
a group of people, Admire Vega ends up eating
the majority of the stack.
